docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JAN-29-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLAINTIFF REQUESTING TO HAVE HER HUSBAND AS A WITNESS ON HER BEHALF, FILED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$30.00) SERVED DEC-23-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NORTHPOINT APARTMENTS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-29-2010 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-08-2010 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-08-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-08-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF APPEARS BY TELEPHONE. DEFENDANT APPEARS IN COURT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-08-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIMONE, KATIE-ADELINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORTHPOINT APARTMENTS $538.32 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $598.32, THE JUDGMENT REPRPESENTS AN ADJUSTMENT FOR THE DEPRECIATED VALUE OF THE CARPET. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
